violations.text: Wood is used in the construction of storage shelves in the serving line area. Non-food contact surfaces of equipment that are exposed to splash, spillage, or other food soiling or that require frequent cleaning must be constructed of a nonabsorbent and smooth material. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 05/14/2024
3 bay sink is lacking a faucet head to adequately fill all 3 compartments. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 05/15/2024

The floor and wall junctures in the kitchen area do not have coving. The floor and wall junctures must be coved and closed to no larger than 1/32nd of an inch. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 05/17/2024

The ceiling in the deli area is covered with tiles that are not smooth, durable, and easily cleanable. Establishment to replace before opening. -A wall in the meat department is constructed of wood. New Violation. Correct By: 05/18/2023
